_note: Real-world case where real_INSPECT_DATE is null and assay_UPLOAD_DATE is weeks later than func_DATE — proves we must fall back to func_DATE (visit), not upload date.
ori_TYPE_NAME: 特約醫事機構定期上傳
order_NAME: 電腦斷層造影  －  無造影劑
desc:
Computed Tomography of Brain Without Enhancement Show:

Method:
Axial noncontrast 5 mm sections from the skull base to the vertex were obtained.

Impression:
1. No apparent ICH
2. Senile cortical atrophy and cerebral small vessel disease.
3. Pan-paranasal sinusitis.
